name: Black Walnut Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, molasses, sweetened condensed milk, water, margarine, and salt in a large pot.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally until it reaches the hard ball stage (265-270°F).
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
4. Spread chopped black walnuts evenly on a well-buttered baking sheet.
5. Pour the cooled mixture over the nuts, spreading it out to cover them completely.
6. Allow the taffy to cool until firm enough to handle.
7. Pull and knead the taffy until it becomes stiff and creamy.
8. Cut into one-inch pieces.
Note: Ensure the mixture reaches the correct temperature before adding vanilla extract. When handling the cooled taffy, use caution to avoid burning yourself.
